config.applyDescription: Review config changes. Applying will restart the gateway.
config.discardDescription: This will restore the config to its state before your recent changes. This cannot be undone.
home.title: Home
home.duplicateInstalls: Multiple openclaw installations detected — this may cause version conflicts:
home.deleteAgentDescription: This will remove the agent from the config and any channel bindings associated with it.
installChat.title: Connect Instance
installChat.inputPlaceholder: Describe your connection target or ask a question...
installChat.sshPassphrasePlaceholder: Leave empty if key is not encrypted
installChat.doneHint: Click when the install is complete
installChat.sshConfigPresetHint: Selecting an alias fills host alias, username, port, and key path.
installChat.connectRemoteDescription: Enter SSH connection details to connect to a remote OpenClaw instance.
installChat.connectDockerDescription: Specify the host-side OpenClaw home directory for this Docker instance (not Docker root, and no container ID needed).
installChat.connectWsl2Description: Specify a WSL2 OpenClaw home path (for example \\wsl$\\Ubuntu\\home\\<user>\\.openclaw).
installChat.existingDescription: An instance of this type already exists. Would you like to use the existing one or install a new one?
installChat.notReady: Install completed but instance is not ready
install.docker.precheck.details: Docker, Docker Compose, and git are available
install.docker.install.details: Prepared official OpenClaw repository for Docker setup
install.docker.verify.details: Official Docker compose configuration and local image verified
install.local.precheck.detailsNotFound: OpenClaw not found locally; install step will run installer
install.ssh.precheck.detailsNotFound: OpenClaw not found on remote host; install step will run installer
home.restoreDescription: This will restore config and workspace files from backup "{{name}}". Current files will be overwritten.
home.deleteBackupDescription: This will permanently delete backup "{{name}}". This action cannot be undone.
home.remoteReadFailed: Failed to read remote OpenClaw instance: {{error}}
settings.title: Settings
settings.oauthHint: For OAuth providers, you can authorize directly in Add Profile (Start OAuth -> paste callback URL/code). CLI login is still supported.
settings.oauthHintSuffix: Profiles created via CLI will appear in the list on the right.
settings.credentialSourceEnvHint: Use an env var name (e.g. OPENAI_API_KEY) or auth profile id (e.g. openai:default).
settings.oauthProviderHint: Provider {{provider}} uses OAuth. Log in first, then add/save the profile.
settings.oauthAuthRefHint: If empty, ClawPal will use the default credential source (openai-codex:default).
settings.oauthRedirectInputPlaceholder: Paste callback URL or code from browser
settings.oauthRedirectRequired: Redirect URL or auth code is required
settings.oauthStartSuccess: Authorization link generated. Complete authorization in your browser, then paste callback URL/code here.
settings.keyAvailable: Usable credential detected (source: {{source}}). Leave empty to reuse.
settings.deleteProfileDescription: This will permanently delete the profile "{{name}}". This action cannot be undone.
settings.importLocalProfilesSuccess: Imported local OpenClaw profiles: created {{created}}, reused {{reused}}
settings.importLocalProfilesFailed: Failed to import local OpenClaw profiles: {{error}}
settings.importRemoteProfilesSuccess: Imported remote OpenClaw profiles from {{target}}: synced {{synced}}
settings.importRemoteProfilesFailed: Failed to import remote OpenClaw profiles: {{error}}
settings.pushProfilesSelectTargetFirst: Select a target first before choosing profiles.
settings.pushProfilesSelectionRequired: Choose at least one pushable profile.
settings.pushProfileBlockedOauth: OAuth/session profiles cannot be pushed automatically. Re-auth on the target OpenClaw.
settings.pushProfileBlockedMissingCreden: This profile has no resolved static credential to push.
settings.testProfileNoAuth: No usable credential found for this profile (API key / OAuth / env var).
settings.testProfileProviderMissing: Provider {{provider}} was not found in catalog
settings.testProfileModelMissing: Model {{model}} was not found in catalog
settings.zeroclawModelHint: Optional global override. Leave empty to let Doctor Claw auto-select model from available profiles.
settings.alphaFeaturesDescription: Optional debugging surfaces stay behind alpha toggles.
settings.alphaEnableZeroclawUiHint: When enabled, diagnosis runs with Doctor Claw. When disabled, it uses the original diagnosis flow.
settings.alphaEnableRescueBotUiHint: When enabled, show Rescue Bot in Doctor.
settings.alphaEnableSshTransferSpeedUiHi: When enabled, show real-time upload/download speed near Model Sync for remote SSH instances.
settings.alphaEnableClawpalLogsUiHint: When enabled, add a ClawPal Logs entry to the sidebar for local app and error logs.
settings.alphaEnableGatewayLogsUiHint: When enabled, show a gateway logs icon in Doctor Claw.
settings.alphaEnableOpenclawContextUiHin: When enabled, add a Context page to the sidebar with collapsible Sessions and Backups.
settings.zeroclawModelSaveFailed: Failed to save Doctor Claw model preference: {{error}}
settings.zeroclawDoctorUiSaveFailed: Failed to save Doctor UI preference: {{error}}
settings.rescueBotUiSaveFailed: Failed to save Rescue Bot UI preference: {{error}}
settings.sshTransferSpeedUiSaveFailed: Failed to save SSH transfer speed preference: {{error}}
settings.clawpalLogsUiSaveFailed: Failed to save ClawPal logs preference: {{error}}
settings.gatewayLogsUiSaveFailed: Failed to save gateway logs preference: {{error}}
settings.openclawContextUiSaveFailed: Failed to save OpenClaw context preference: {{error}}
settings.zeroclawNoProfiles: No compatible model profiles found. Add a model profile in the Profiles section to enable Doctor Claw.
settings.zeroclawNoProfilesLink: No compatible model profiles found. Go to Profiles to add one →
settings.bugReportSentryBuiltin: The default backend uses ClawPal's public Sentry intake for sanitized bug reports. Builders can override CLAWPAL_SENTRY_DSN to use their own project.
settings.bugReportDescription: Only sanitized error metadata is sent (message, stack, app version, OS, timestamp, session UUID). API keys, tokens, emails, host/IP and home paths are removed before upload.
settings.bugReportSaveFailed: Failed to save bug report settings: {{error}}
settings.bugReportLoadFailed: Failed to load bug report settings: {{error}}
doctor.title: 🦞 help 🦞
doctor.clearAllDescription: This will permanently delete {{count}} session file(s). This action cannot be undone.
doctor.failedLoadRemoteSessions: Failed to load remote session files
doctor.cleanEmptyDescription: Delete {{count}} empty session(s) for {{agent}}. These sessions have no messages.
doctor.cleanLowValueDescription: Delete {{count}} low-value session(s) for {{agent}}. These are old sessions with minimal interaction.
doctor.deleteSelectedDescription: Delete {{count}} session(s) for {{agent}}. This cannot be undone.
doctor.restoreDescription: This will restore config and workspace files from backup "{{name}}". Current files will be overwritten. Session data will not be affected.
doctor.deleteBackupDescription: This will permanently delete backup "{{name}}". This action cannot be undone.
doctor.logsDescription: View application logs for debugging and monitoring.
doctor.noLogMatches: No log lines matched your search.
doctor.profileSyncNoLocalProfiles: Remote sync succeeded, but local model list is still empty (check local profiles path and read permission).
doctor.profileSyncNoUsableKeys: Remote profiles exist, but no usable credential was resolved (check credential source / env vars).
doctor.profileSyncNoProfiles: No syncable model profiles found on the remote instance.
doctor.profileSyncFailed: Failed to sync remote auth info: {{error}}
doctor.pushRelatedSecretsSuccess: Related secret push done: providers {{providers}}, written {{written}}, skipped {{skipped}}
doctor.pushRelatedSecretsConfirmDescript: This will push related provider credentials to {{host}} and may overwrite existing entries in the remote auth store.
doctor.startupStarting: Context ready. Waiting for Doctor Claw's first response...
doctor.pendingHandoffReady: Context is queued. Click the button below to start with this issue.
doctor.targetUnavailable: The selected SSH target no longer exists. Please reselect a target.
doctor.notPairedHint: The device on {{host}} is not paired with its gateway. SSH into that machine and run: openclaw devices list, then approve the pending request with: openclaw devices approve <request-id>
doctor.agentSourceHint: Choose where Doctor Claw runs diagnostics:
doctor.targetExecutionLocalWarning: Commands will run on the local machine in this target.
doctor.firstTimeApproval: First access — click Allow to auto-approve future reads to this path
doctor.rescueBotHint: Safe checks and guided fixes before touching your main gateway.
doctor.rescueBotConnectRequired: Connect to the selected remote instance before using the recovery helper.
doctor.rescueBotNotConfigured: Rescue bot is not configured yet. Activate to set it up.
doctor.rescueBotAlreadyNotConfigured: Rescue bot is not configured on this instance.
doctor.rescueBotAlreadyConfiguredState: Rescue bot "{{profile}}" is already configured on port {{port}}.
doctor.rescueBotActivatedConfigured: Rescue bot "{{profile}}" was already configured (port {{port}}); activation refreshed.
doctor.rescueBotFailedTimeout: Rescue bot activation timed out while waiting for gateway health checks. Open Gateway logs and verify rescue profile startup details. Raw error: {{error}}
doctor.primaryRecoveryActivateHint: Enable the helper to unlock Check Primary Agent.
doctor.primaryRecoveryHint: Run a structured check before attempting repairs on the primary profile.
doctor.primaryNoIssues: No issues found in primary profile.
doctor.primaryRepairComingSoon: Auto repair via Rescue Bot is coming next.
doctor.tempProviderHint: This profile is used only to give the temporary repair gateway inference. Prefer a provider with a static API key.
doctor.tempProviderSaved: Temporary gateway provider saved. Resuming repair...
doctor.tempProviderActionRequired: Temporary gateway needs a provider before repair can continue.
doctor.fullAutoWarning: In full-auto mode, all commands from the agent will be executed immediately without your approval. This includes write operations and arbitrary shell commands. Only enable this if you trust the agent source.
orchestrator.title: Recipe activity
orchestrator.description: See what each recipe changed, when it ran, and where it was applied.
orchestrator.scopeAllDescription: Showing recipe activity across every connected environment.
orchestrator.runtimeDescription: Review what each recipe changed and anything that still needs attention.
orchestrator.clearRunsCurrentDescription: This removes the recorded recipe runs for the current environment. Event logs will stay intact.
orchestrator.clearRunsAllDescription: This removes the recorded recipe runs for every environment. Event logs will stay intact.
orchestrator.eventLogDescription: Open this only when you need low-level diagnostic details.
history.title: History
history.rollbackQueued: Rollback queued — preview and apply when ready
history.rollbackConfirmDescription: This will revert your configuration to the state captured in this snapshot. The current config will be replaced.
channels.title: Channels
channels.noChannels: No channels configured. Add channel plugins in your OpenClaw config, then refresh to see them here.
channels.noDiscordChannels: No Discord channels cached. Click "Refresh" to discover channels from Discord.
recipes.title: Recipes
recipes.sourceHelp: Paste a local recipe file, recipe folder, recipe library folder, or an https:// recipe URL. The folder button picks a directory by default, and dropped files or folders only fill the field until you import.
recipes.importRequiresPath: Enter a recipe source to import.
recipes.importConflictSummary_one: {{count}} workspace recipe already exists. Confirm to overwrite it.
recipes.importConflictSummary_other: {{count}} workspace recipes already exist. Confirm to overwrite them.
recipes.importConflictDescription_one: This import would replace {{count}} saved workspace recipe.
recipes.importConflictDescription_other: This import would replace {{count}} saved workspace recipes.
recipes.pickDirectoryFailed: Failed to choose a recipe folder: {{error}}
recipes.dropReadyNotice: Source ready. Click Import to save it into workspace.
recipes.dropMultipleNotice: Multiple items were dropped. Using the first path only.
recipes.runtimeDescription: Latest structured runs and instance health for your recipes.
recipes.workspaceDescription: Saved recipe drafts from your local workspace.
recipes.workspaceDraftFallbackDescriptio: Saved recipe draft from your local workspace.
recipes.workspaceDeleteDescription: This permanently removes {{name}} from your workspace.
recipes.workspaceConflictHint: This local copy was changed and the bundled version also moved forward. Review it before replacing anything.
recipeStudio.title: Recipe Studio
recipeStudio.saveDialogDescription: Choose the workspace slug for this recipe draft. Final slug validation still happens in the backend.
recipeStudio.sourceHint: Structured recipe source is the canonical authoring format.
recipeStudio.sourceReadOnlyHint: Builtin recipes are inspect-only until you fork them into your workspace.
recipeStudio.externalDraftHint: You can edit this draft now; save workflow lands in the next task.
recipeStudio.sourceSummaryBody: This editor works directly against canonical recipe JSON instead of legacy step-only transforms.
recipeStudio.formSummaryBody: This editor reshapes the same canonical recipe source into editable metadata, params, steps, and actions.
recipeStudio.formUnavailable: Form mode becomes available after this source parses into one structured recipe document.
recipeStudio.formSyncErrorTitle: Form and source are temporarily out of sync
recipeStudio.formSyncSourceError: Source mode has syntax or structure problems. Form mode is showing the last valid snapshot until parsing succeeds again.
recipeStudio.formSyncFormError: Kept source mode on the last valid snapshot because the current form edit cannot serialize yet: {{error}}
recipeStudio.form.name: Display name
recipeStudio.form.emptyParams: No params in this recipe yet.
recipeStudio.form.emptySteps: No steps in this recipe yet.
recipeStudio.form.emptyActions: No execution actions in this template yet.
recipeStudio.form.syncHint: Form mode keeps canonical source as the single truth. Invalid edits stay local until they serialize cleanly.
recipeStudio.sampleParamsDescription: Use the current draft to fill sample inputs before previewing its structured plan.
recipeStudio.validationNeedsAttention: Source needs attention before it becomes a reliable draft.
recipeStudio.unsavedLeaveConfirm: You have unsaved recipe edits. Leave the studio anyway?
recipeStudio.unsavedResetConfirm: Discard the current recipe draft and start a new one?
cook.reviewTitle: Review what this recipe will do
cook.reviewDescription: Check the outcome, where changes will land, and anything that needs attention before continuing.
cook.reviewRequirementsTitle: What must be ready before this runs
cook.reviewRequirementApproval: Approve this recipe for the current saved version before running it.
cook.reviewRequirementReady: Everything currently needed for this recipe is ready.
cook.reviewApprovalBlocker: This recipe has not been approved for execution yet.
cook.reviewApprovalBlockerDetail: Approve the current saved version before you continue.
cook.reviewDefaultRoute: This recipe will run on the selected instance.
cook.reviewSkippedHint_one: {{count}} optional step will be skipped because its inputs were left blank.
cook.reviewSkippedHint_other: {{count}} optional steps will be skipped because their inputs were left blank.
cook.authBlocker: Resolve auth precheck errors before execution.
cook.approvalDescription: This saved recipe needs a one-time approval for its current version before ClawPal can run it.
cook.executionActiveDescription: ClawPal is applying the confirmed recipe to the selected instance.
cook.executionApplyNote: This view tracks the overall recipe apply operation. It is not a per-command live console.
cook.executionFailedDetail: Execution stopped while applying {{actionable}} planned change(s)
cook.plannedChangesDescription: These are the changes ClawPal is applying for this recipe run.
cook.doneDescription: Here is what changed and where you can go next.
cook.applyHint: Use "Apply Changes" in the sidebar to restart the gateway and activate config changes.
cook.missingExecutionSpec: Execution plan is missing a structured spec.
chat.noAgents: No agents available. Create an agent first.
createAgent.title: New Agent
createAgent.agentIdHint: Letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores only.
upgrade.title: Upgrade OpenClaw
upgrade.confirmDescription: This will back up your config and upgrade OpenClaw.
upgrade.confirmDescriptionRemote: This will back up your config and upgrade OpenClaw on the remote instance.
instance.label: Label
instance.passwordWarning: Password authentication stores credential locally. Prefer SSH Config/Private Key when possible.
instance.sshConfigPresetHint: Selecting a host alias auto-fills host, user, and port.
instance.duplicateLabelError: This SSH name already exists. Please change Label.
instance.deleteDescription: This will remove the SSH host "{{label}}" from ClawPal. The remote server itself will not be affected.
instance.dockerDeleteDescription: This will remove Docker instance "{{label}}" from ClawPal tabs.
instance.dockerDeleteBackupHint: If you need this environment later, back up the directory below before deleting data.
instance.dockerDeleteRemoveDataHint: If unchecked, only the tab is removed and files remain on disk.
instance.keyGuideLink: No SSH key? Click here for setup guide
instance.keyGuideStep1Title: Step 1: Generate a key (if you don't have one)
instance.keyGuideStep1Hint: If ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 already exists, you can skip this step.
instance.keyGuideStep2Title: Step 2: Copy public key to server
instance.keyGuideStep2Hint: You will need to enter the server password once.
ssh.errorConnectionRefused: Connection refused — please check Host and Port
ssh.errorNoSuchFile: Key file not found — please check Key Path
ssh.errorHostUnreachable: Host unreachable or hostname cannot be resolved — please check Host (for example, use reachable IP/FQDN instead of an unknown alias)
ssh.errorPassphrase: Private key is locked — enter key passphrase and retry
ssh.errorPermissionDenied: Authentication failed — please check username and key
ssh.errorHostKey: Host key verification failed — try ssh manually first to confirm
ssh.errorTimeout: Connection timed out — please check network and Host reachability
ssh.errorSessionStale: SSH session is stale — reconnect and retry
ssh.errorRemoteCommandFailed: Remote command failed — verify remote environment and command output
ssh.errorUnknown: SSH command failed — inspect diagnostics and retry
ssh.repairSwitchAuthMethodToSshConfig: Switch auth method to SSH config
ssh.repairSuggestKnownHostsBootstrap: Confirm host key by running ssh manually once
ssh.repairSuggestAuthorizedKeysCheck: Check authorized_keys and username on the server
ssh.passphraseValidationFailed: SSH passphrase check failed (host: {{host}}). Verify the passphrase is correct or unlock the key first.
ssh.missingKeyFile: No usable private key file found (host: {{host}}). Check IdentityFile in SSH config and confirm the key is readable.
ssh.publicKeyRejected: SSH authentication failed (host: {{host}}). Passphrase was submitted, but the remote host still rejected it. Check authorized_keys, use user root, and confirm the host fingerprint.
ssh.publicKeyAuthFailed: SSH authentication failed (host: {{host}}). The remote host rejected the public key. Check authorized_keys, verify the key file, and confirm the user and host fingerprint.
ssh.passphraseCancelled: SSH passphrase input cancelled (host: {{host}}). Retry and enter a passphrase if the key is encrypted.
ssh.passphrasePlaceholder: Leave empty if key has no passphrase
cron.title: Cron Jobs
cron.noJobsHint: Use the OpenClaw CLI to add cron jobs: openclaw cron add
cron.name: Name
cron.deleteDescription: This will immediately and permanently remove "{{name}}" and its run history. No apply-changes step — deletion takes effect right away.
watchdog.title: Watchdog
watchdog.notDeployedHint: The watchdog monitors cron job execution and auto-restarts the gateway if needed. Deploy it to enable monitoring.
queue.previewDescription: Review {{count}} queued command(s). Applying will execute them and restart the gateway.
queue.previewWarningsDescription: Preview validates the config diff first. Filesystem side effects still happen during apply.
queue.discardDescription: This will remove {{count}} queued command(s). No changes will be applied.
start.welcomeHint: Select an instance to manage, or connect a new one.
start.addInstanceHint: Connect an existing OpenClaw / Docker / WSL2 / SSH instance
quickDiagnose.title: Quick Diagnose
quickDiagnose.placeholder: Diagnose this issue and propose concrete next steps.
onboarding.summary: This instance needs some setup before it's ready to use
onboarding.noProfilesSummary: No model profiles detected yet. Doctor Claw needs at least one available model profile.
onboarding.actionCheckDoctor: Check the Doctor page — the instance is not healthy
onboarding.actionAddProfile: Go to Settings to add an AI model profile
onboarding.actionSetDefault: Select a default model on the Home page
onboarding.actionSyncProfiles: Open Settings and sync/extract profiles from your existing OpenClaw config
onboarding.actionConnectInstanceFirst: Connect an instance first from Start, then configure model profiles
